# Elyphant

> AI-powered social gifting platform that combines verified wishlists, Nicole AI recommendations, and automated gifting to help people send gifts recipients actually want.

Elyphant connects friends and family through wishlists, schedules birthday and holiday gifts automatically, and uses Nicole AI to suggest personalized presents from a curated marketplace.

## Pages

- [Home](/home): Personalized landing with upcoming events and recommendations.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Curated gift catalog with AI search and filters.
- [Discover](/discover): Browse trending gifts and lifestyle collections.
- [AI Gifting](/ai-gifting): Nicole AI conversational gift finder.
- [Auto Gifts](/recurring-gifts): Set up recurring automated gifts for events.
- [Gifting](/gifting): Schedule and send gifts to connections.
- [Cart](/cart): Review items and check out.
- [FAQ](/faq): Returns, fulfillment, privacy, and platform questions.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account access and sign-up.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
